Analysis Report

Emmanuel Cazottes

29 January, 2026

Analyse the TF enriched in most/least human selected sequences compared to the AL pool.

This notebook take as input the sea.tsv file obtained by doing enrichment analysis with SEA with the HOCOMOCO 13 as TF motifs database and thresdholding on FDR 0.01.

Filtering for K562 TF using the GTEX (V8) Whole Blood annotations. HOCOMOCO13 is using Uniprot IDs while GTEX uses gene symbols, the tf_masterlist.tsv file was downloaded from the Autosome.org website and contains the TF Uniprot IDs and their corresponding gene symbols.

Data import and preprocessing

Selection of TFs expressed in K562

sea.files= list.files("sequence_analysis/SEA", "sea.tsv", recursive = T, full.names = T)

#Select TF expressed in K562
gtex = read.table("reference/GTEx_Analysis_2017-06-05_v8_RNASeQCv1.1.9_gene_median_tpm.gct.gz", header = T, sep = "\t",skip = 2)
gtex.selected.TF = subset(gtex, (Whole.Blood>=1))$Description

#Trim the table to remove the mouse orthologs 
tf.masterlist = read.table("reference/tf_masterlist.tsv", header = T, sep = "\t", fill = T)
tf.masterlist = tf.masterlist[grep("HUMAN", tf.masterlist$curated.uniprot_id),]
tf.masterlist$curated.uniprot_id = str_split(tf.masterlist$curated.uniprot_id, "_",simplify = T)[,1]
tf.masterlist = tf.masterlist[,c("curated.uniprot_id","auto.gene_symbol")]

#Select for TFs expressed in WB
#Merging with the TF masterlist from the autosome team is important because the TFs IDs are from uniprot and not gene symbols
gtex = merge(gtex[,c("Description","Whole.Blood")], tf.masterlist, by.x="Description", by.y="auto.gene_symbol")
gtex.selected.TF = subset(gtex, (Whole.Blood>=1))$curated.uniprot_id
import.sea = function(sea.tsv){
  sea.df = read.table(sea.tsv, sep = "\t", header = T)
  #Format the TF names
  sea.df$ALT_ID =  sea.df$ID
  sea.df$ID = str_split(sea.df$ID, "\\.", simplify = T)[,1]
  sea.df = subset(sea.df, ID %in% gtex.selected.TF)
  
  sea.df = sea.df[order(sea.df$ENR_RATIO,decreasing = T),]
  sea.df = sea.df[!(duplicated(sea.df$ID)),]
  sea.df$ID = factor(sea.df$ID, levels = unique(sea.df$ID))
  sea.df$ALT_ID = factor(sea.df$ALT_ID, levels = unique(sea.df$ALT_ID))
  
  return(sea.df)
}
sea.tnb = lapply(sea.files, function(x){import.sea(x)})
names(sea.tnb) = c("Least diverse (1x60)", "Most diverse (1x60)", "Least diverse (3x20)", "Most diverse (3x20)","Least uncertain (1x60)", "Most uncertain (1x60)", "Least uncertain (3x20)", "Most uncertain (3x20)")

rounds = rep(c("1x60","1x60","3x20","3x20"),2)
info = rep(c("Least","Most"),4)
al.method = c(rep("Diverse",4), rep("Uncertain",4))

for(i in seq_along(sea.tnb)){
  sea.tnb[[i]]$DB = names(sea.tnb)[i]
  sea.tnb[[i]]$rounds = rounds[i]
  sea.tnb[[i]]$info = info[i]
  sea.tnb[[i]]$al.method = al.method[i]
}

sea.tnb.df = do.call("rbind", sea.tnb)

sea.tnb.3x20 = sea.tnb.df[grep( "\\(3x20\\)",sea.tnb.df$DB),]
sea.tnb.3x20$DB = factor(sea.tnb.3x20$DB, levels = c("Least uncertain (3x20)", "Most uncertain (3x20)", "Least diverse (3x20)", "Most diverse (3x20)"))
sea.tnb.1x60 = sea.tnb.df[grep( "\\(1x60\\)",sea.tnb.df$DB),]
sea.tnb.1x60$DB = factor(sea.tnb.1x60$DB, levels = c("Least uncertain (1x60)", "Most uncertain (1x60)", "Least diverse (1x60)", "Most diverse (1x60)"))

Jitter plots

library(ggrepel)

top10.3x20 <-  do.call("rbind",lapply(group_split(sea.tnb.3x20, DB), function(x){
  df = x %>%
    filter(ENR_RATIO > 2) %>%
    arrange(desc(ENR_RATIO)) %>%
    head(10)
}))



jitter.enr.3x20 = ggplot(sea.tnb.3x20 , aes(x=DB, y=ENR_RATIO, colour=info))+
  geom_jitter(size=.5)+
  xlab("")+
  ylab("TFBS enrichment over the AL pool")+
  ggtitle("Human - 3x20")+
  geom_text_repel(data = top10.3x20, aes(x=DB, y=ENR_RATIO, label = ID), size=2.5, max.overlaps=20, show.legend=FALSE, colour="black")+
    theme(aspect.ratio = c(0.85/1),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5, "mm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size=7), axis.title = element_text(size=10),legend.position = "none")

top10.1x60 <-  do.call("rbind",lapply(group_split(sea.tnb.1x60, DB), function(x){
  df = x %>%
    filter(ENR_RATIO > 2) %>%
    arrange(desc(ENR_RATIO)) %>%
    head(10)
}))

jitter.enr.1x60 = ggplot(sea.tnb.1x60 , aes(x=DB, y=ENR_RATIO, colour=info))+
  geom_jitter(size=.5)+
  geom_text_repel(data = top10.1x60, aes(x=DB, y=ENR_RATIO, label = ID), size=2.5, max.overlaps=20, show.legend=FALSE, colour="black")+
  xlab("")+
  ylab("TFBS enrichment over the AL pool")+
  ggtitle("Human - 1x60")+
    theme(aspect.ratio = c(0.85/1),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5, "mm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size=7), axis.title = element_text(size=10),legend.position = "none")
jitter.enr.3x20

jitter.enr.1x60
